text: I feel a stimulating curiosity here. The space around me is clean, modern, and clearly designed for innovation and contemplation. The juxtaposition of R+D on the vibrant wall speaks loudly of experimentation and thought. I am aware of my smallness within a structure that encourages big ideas. The quiet, polished surfaces and the echo of my footsteps amplify the anticipation of discovery. My mind is open, eager to ponder, and slightly in awe of the knowledge contained here.
